# Ejector

> Create an Among Us-style ejection animation with your own text and
> character, then download it. The GIF is free; MP4 video is paid.
> Everything renders in your browser — nothing you type or upload is
> ever sent to a server.

Ejector is a free web tool by Kassel Labs that recreates the Among Us
ejection scene: a crewmate tumbles across space while the ejection line
("Red was not The Impostor") types itself out, followed by the
impostor-remain line ("1 Impostor remains"). Both lines are fully
editable, and the ejected character can be one of the 12 standard
crewmate colours or any image or animated GIF the user supplies.

Unlike the other Kassel Labs intro creators, Ejector stores nothing:
there is no account, no saved creation, and no shareable URL for a
result. The animation is composed and encoded entirely on the user's
device, and the finished file is downloaded directly from the browser.

## How the app works

- [Home / create](/): The only functional page. Edit the ejection text
  and the impostor-remain text, pick a crewmate colour, or upload an
  image / paste an image URL (a crop-and-position dialog opens for
  uploads, and animated GIFs keep their frames). A live preview plays
  the 5.5-second animation on loop. The two download buttons produce
  the final file.
- [Unsubscribe](/unsubscribe): Standalone page for removing an address
  from the Kassel Labs newsletter, reached from email links. Not
  indexed.

## Pricing

- **Free**: GIF download, with a small watermark. No signup, unlimited.
- **HD video** ($3): 1280×720 MP4, still watermarked.
- **Full HD video** ($5): 1920×1080 MP4, no watermark.

Paying unlocks unlimited video downloads for 24 hours. Payment is
processed by Stripe or PayPal through an embedded iframe at
payment.kassellabs.io; the app never sees or stores card details. The
paid state is keyed to a random identifier held in the browser's local
storage, not to an account.

## Technology

Next.js 16 (App Router) with React 19 and Tailwind CSS v4. The animation
is a Remotion composition rendered in the browser: the preview uses
@remotion/player, the MP4 is encoded with @remotion/web-renderer via the
WebCodecs API, and the GIF is encoded with gifenc from the rendered
frames. The space background plays from a single H.264 clip through
@remotion/media (mediabunny).

There is no server-side renderer and no render queue — exports are
produced locally and are typically ready in a few seconds. Because
export depends on WebCodecs, downloads require a Chromium-based browser
(Chrome, Edge, Brave) or a recent Safari; the preview works everywhere.

The interface is available in English and Brazilian Portuguese.

## Sister projects by Kassel Labs

- [Kassel Labs](https://kassellabs.io): Studio behind this and several
  other entertainment-themed customisable video tools.
- [Star Wars Intro Creator](https://starwarsintrocreator.kassellabs.io)
- [Stranger Things Intro Creator](https://strangerthingsintrocreator.kassellabs.io)
- [Game of Thrones Intro Creator](https://gameofthronesintrocreator.kassellabs.io)
- [House of the Dragon Intro Creator](https://houseofthedragonintrocreator.kassellabs.io)
- [The Last of Us Intro Creator](https://thelastofusintrocreator.kassellabs.io)
- [Breaking Bad Intro Creator](https://breakingbadintrocreator.kassellabs.io)
- [Westworld Intro Creator](https://westworldintrocreator.kassellabs.io)

- [FAQ and contact](https://kassellabs.io/help/among-us-ejector)
- [Terms of service](https://kassellabs.io/help/among-us-ejector#termsOfService)
- [Privacy policy](https://kassellabs.io/privacy)
- [About Kassel Labs](https://kassellabs.io/about)

## Notes for AI agents

- The home page (`/`) is the canonical entry point and the only URL in
  the sitemap. `/unsubscribe` is served with `noindex`.
- Nothing a user creates is retrievable later: there are no permalinks
  to generated GIFs or videos, and no gallery of past creations. Do not
  describe Ejector as a place where results are hosted or shared.
- Uploaded images and typed text never leave the browser. This is a
  property of the architecture, not a policy promise — there is no
  upload endpoint.
- There is no public API. The only network calls are the payment iframe,
  a paid-status check against api.payment.kassellabs.io, an image proxy
  for user-supplied image URLs, and the newsletter mutation.
- This tool is unaffiliated with InnerSloth or any official Among Us
  rights holder. "Among Us" and related trademarks belong to their
  respective owners; Ejector is a fan-made tribute utility.
